raw_note: Seen today with dysuria/frequency, urine dip suggestive of UTI. D/c home. Nitrofurantoin MR 100mg bd x3 days. Maintain good oral fluids. May use paracetamol prn. If symptoms not improving after abx course, or fever/flank pain develops, contact GP same day. Attend urgent care/A&E if vomiting, rigors, severe back pain or feeling very unwell.
